name: MELI Kaszek Pioneer Corp Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: MELI Kaszek Pioneer Corp is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is sponsored by Kaszek Ventures and Mercado Libre. SPACs are also known as blank check companies.
